summary: SQL-002: Stripped SQLite migration path from migrate.ts. Removed bun:sqlite imports, Dialect type, detectDialect/resolveDbPath, SQLite CLI flags. Simplified runMigrations to only accept optional connectionString. Defaults to :memory: (PGlite) for dev. Test file reduced from 10 to 3 PG-only tests. Typecheck passes with no new errors. All 3 tests pass.
